category_sources: source_facts.description says iocextract is a defanged indicator of compromise extractor; official docs describe an IOC extractor for URLs, IPs, hashes, emails, and YARA rules.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is iocextract; official ReadTheDocs and GitHub repository use iocextract.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official InQuest ReadTheDocs documentation for iocextract.
repo_sources: Official iocextract ReadTheDocs page links to the GitHub Repository at InQuest/iocextract.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies defanged IOC extraction; official docs list extracting URLs, IP addresses, hashes, emails, and YARA rules from text corpora.
